message:
feat(search): implement embedding daemon server and worker

Upgrade EmbedServer from a stub to a working implementation that
delegates embed requests to EmbedWorker. Server returns an error
response when stopped or when the worker rejects the model selector.

Implement EmbedWorker::process() with HashEmbedder-based embedding
generation. Supported model selectors: None/\"hash\"/\"fnv1a-hash\" for
default 128-dim, or \"fnv1a-hash-<N>\" for explicit dimension. Unknown
models and zero-dimension requests are rejected with descriptive errors.

Add comprehensive tests for both server lifecycle (ping, shutdown,
embed, stopped-state errors) and worker model dispatch (default hash,
dimension overrides, unknown model rejection, invalid dimension).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
